prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on benzene (12 atoms: 6 C + 6 H) performed at B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') using PySCF RKS, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Single-point calculation at the user-supplied geometry (no re-optimization). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

HOMO (index 20) = −7.0468329 eV
LUMO (index 21) = −0.41574728 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV (headline value)

The HOMO and HOMO−1 are nearly degenerate (Δ ≈ 0.5 meV), and LUMO / LUMO+1 are nearly degenerate (Δ ≈ 0.6 meV), consistent with the degenerate e₁g and e₂u symmetry-adapted π orbitals of D₆h benzene.

Total electronic energy: −232.33724 Hartree / −6322.2183 eV / −145793.82 kcal·mol⁻¹.

No warnings were returned by the engine (warnings array is empty). Provenance: computed with chemkit frontier-orbitals skill, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF backend.
